rows.label: qev014302_MSG0001
rows.name:
Fo-fo! You came-mo, you came-mo! I
heard the story from Eliza-san-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0002
rows.name:
Are you the Earthling who will
negotiate with Chacha-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev014302_SEL0011
rows.name:
Immediately ask for the
information on Alex.

rows.label: qev014302_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev014302_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask who he is in the first place.

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0003
rows.name: You're quite impatient-moo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0004
rows.name:
You're just like that fussy woman
who hangs around Eliza-san-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0005
rows.name:
Fumo... The information isn't going
anywhere, so you should calm down
and listen to Chacha's story-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0006
rows.name:
Chacha has been an informant
on this path for 50 years-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0007
rows.name:
I have incredibly amazing information
webs, and my comrades scattered across
Mira teach me all sorts of things-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0008
rows.name:
This scoop is also information
from a reliable source[ST:wide ]— You
should listen with gratitude-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0009
rows.name:
Fo-fo! There was a sniper who
shot Eliza-san and ran away-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0010
rows.name:
Truth is, that man made contact with Alex
in NLA and received a Doll from him-mo.
Chacha's comrade saw the scene-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0011
rows.name:
And so, upon receiving that
witness report, Chacha instructed
his comrade to tail Alex-moo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0012
rows.name:
As a result, not only did we secure the
connection between him and the culprit,
but we even tracked down his hideout-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0013
rows.name:
Amazing, isn't it-mo? This is the skill
produced by Chacha's intuition after 50
years as an informant on this path-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Fumo. And from here on, it becomes business-mo.
So, regarding the information on Alex's
whereabouts... How much will you buy it for-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0015
rows.name:
This is information my comrade
risked his life to acquire-mo.
I can't sell it cheap-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0016
rows.name:
Let's see-moo. How about 10,000G-mo? I
don't think it's a high price at all-moo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_JNK0110
rows.name: Pay

rows.label: qev014302_JNK0120
rows.name: Don't pay

rows.label: qev014302_SEL0121
rows.name: Object that the price is too high.

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0017
rows.name: Fo—! Thanks for the patronage-moo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0018
rows.name:
It seems Alex is currently in
Kurogane no Tairiku, negotiating
with the Growth folks right now-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0019
rows.name:
I'll send you the coordinate data
of the location he's at, so you
should head there straight away-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0020
rows.name:
Chacha also has plenty of feelings
wanting to be of help to Eliza-san-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0021
rows.name:
But business is business-mo. If I don't
get money, I can't eat meals-moo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0022
rows.name:
When you have the money prepared,
I want you to come again-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0023
rows.name:
Fo—! You don't have 10,000G-mo? Then
there's no point in talking-moo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0024
rows.name:
If you want to know Alex's
whereabouts, gather exactly
10,000G and pay it in full-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0025
rows.name:
How about it-mo? The information
on Alex's whereabouts... Do you
feel like buying it now-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0026
rows.name:
Fo-fo! As a special service, I'll
drop it down to 10,000G-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0027
rows.name: Fo—! Thanks for the patronage-moo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0028
rows.name:
It seems Alex is currently in
Kurogane no Tairiku, negotiating
with the Growth folks right now-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0029
rows.name:
I'll send you the coordinate data
of the location he's at, so you
should head there straight away-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0030
rows.name:
Chacha also has plenty of feelings
wanting to help Eliza-san out-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0031
rows.name:
But business is business-mo. If I don't
get money, I can't eat meals-moo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0032
rows.name:
When you have the money prepared,
I want you to come again-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0035
rows.name:
Alex is in Kurogane no Tairiku-mo!
Now, head there straight away and
put a stop to his ambitions-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0036
rows.name:
...Chacha will use the money
received to eat a delicious
meal with his comrades-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0037
rows.name:
It seems you took care of Alex-mo? I
heard from my comrade who was staking
them out in Kurogane no Tairiku-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014302_MSG0038
rows.name:
Fo—! Splendid work-mo! You should hurry
up and tell Eliza-san about it-mo![ST:wait ]
